case_title: AYMAN ASSAF et al VS. PETER SCOTT et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2004 CONTINUED TO JUL-07-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-07-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

HON. ARLENE BORICK, JUDGE PRESIDING; CARLITO MADIA, REPORTER: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-07-2004 CONTINUED TO OCT-06-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-06-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSAF, AYMAN MOOSA, AHED AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT, PETER DOES 1-25 , INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-27-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-26-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-11-2004

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-27-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-27-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-27-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST EDGARDO M. LOPEZ, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-27-2004 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-11-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RHONDA FUNG. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST EDGARDO M. LOPEZ, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-07-2004, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-22-2004. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-07-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST EDGARDO M. LOPEZ, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-07-2004, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-22-2004. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT & ENTIRE ACTION
